name: Sue's Quick Sweet & Tangy Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 Cups Your favorite stock (2/13 oz Cans)
1/2 tsp Orange zest, chopped fine (or up to 1 Tsp)
2 Packages Frozen cooked winter squash (Green Giant), thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the garlic if used, in a few drops of olive oil.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté in part of the stock.
3. Add the remainder of the stock and rest of ingredients.
4. Cook, uncovered, over medium heat until apples have cooked down and soup has reduced to a light creamy consistency.
